speaker: rep
text: Hey Marcus, great to connect again. Last time we talked about the coaching gaps on your team. Ready to see the platform in action?

speaker: prospect
text: Yeah, looking forward to it. I've got my VP of Sales joining in a few minutes too.

speaker: rep
text: Perfect. So, um, before I share my screen, can you remind me what your top priority is — ramp time reduction or ongoing coaching for experienced reps?

speaker: prospect
text: Mainly ramp time. Our new hires take about three months to hit quota and we need to cut that down.

speaker: rep
text: Got it. So let me show you how RepReady works. First, here's the session setup screen. You pick a call scenario — like a discovery call or a demo — and the AI plays the prospect. The platform has pre-built scenarios, custom scenario builder, multi-language support, difficulty levels from beginner to advanced, persona customization with different buyer types, industry-specific templates, and you can even upload your own call recordings to create new scenarios.

speaker: prospect
text: Okay, that's a lot. Can you just show me the basic flow?

speaker: rep
text: Of course, sorry about that. Let me walk you through a simple discovery call scenario. The rep starts the session, the AI prospect speaks first, and coaching prompts appear in real time on the side panel.

speaker: prospect
text: Nice. What kind of things does it coach on?

speaker: rep
text: Great question. It detects things like talking too long without pausing, using filler words like um and uh, dumping features without tying them to pain points, and missing key discovery questions.

speaker: prospect
text: Can we customize what it looks for?

speaker: rep
text: Absolutely. You define coaching rules with detection logic and the system evaluates them against a rolling window of the conversation. Let me show you the rules editor.

speaker: prospect
text: This looks straightforward. How does scoring work at the end of a call?

speaker: rep
text: After the session ends, the platform generates a scorecard. Each coaching rule gets rated as good, needs work, or missed. There's also an overall score from zero to a hundred and a summary with specific recommendations.

speaker: prospect
text: That's helpful. My VP is going to want to see aggregate data across reps though.

speaker: rep
text: So we have, like, you know, um, a manager dashboard that shows team-level analytics. I can pull that up for you.

speaker: prospect
text: Before you do that — how does this integrate with our existing CRM? We're on HubSpot.

speaker: rep
text: We integrate with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Outreach, Gong, Chorus, Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace, and we have a REST API for custom integrations. Our webhook system supports real-time event streaming and we also have a Zapier connector for no-code workflows.

speaker: prospect
text: I really just need to know about HubSpot.

speaker: rep
text: Right. For HubSpot specifically, we sync session data and scorecards directly to contact records. Setup takes about ten minutes.

speaker: prospect
text: That's what I needed to hear. What does onboarding look like for a team of twenty?

speaker: rep
text: We provide a dedicated CSM who handles the full rollout. Typically it's a one-hour kickoff, then self-serve from there. Most teams are up and running within a day.

speaker: prospect
text: And pricing? We need to budget for this quarter.

speaker: rep
text: For a team of twenty, you'd be looking at our Growth plan. I can send a detailed proposal after this call. Would it make sense to loop in your VP now to discuss next steps?

speaker: prospect
text: She actually just joined. Can you give her the two-minute version?

speaker: rep
text: Of course. Hi! RepReady is an AI coaching platform that simulates sales calls and gives reps real-time feedback. Marcus's team would use it to cut ramp time for new SDRs.

speaker: prospect
text: Sounds promising. Let's schedule a technical review with our ops team next week and go from there.
